{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Marketing & Communications",
  "description": "Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing &amp; Communications

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Department:&nbsp;Marketing &amp; Corporate Communications
Business Type:&nbsp;Supermarket &amp; QSR Retail Chain
Reports to:&nbsp;Managing Director (MD)

Role Purpose


	The Head of Marketing &amp; Communications provides strategic leadership for brand, marketing, communications, and customer engagement across the company&#39;s supermarket and QSR businesses in Nigeria.
	The role is accountable for driving&nbsp;revenue growth, strengthening&nbsp;brand trust, enhancing&nbsp;customer experience, and supporting the company&#39;s ESG commitments, while working closely with the Managing Director and senior leadership team.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Marketing &amp; Growth Leadership:


	Develop and execute integrated marketing strategies aligned with annual revenue and expansion targets.
	Translate business objectives into measurable marketing and growth initiatives.
	Lead annual marketing planning and budget management across all outlets.
	Provide data-driven insights and recommendations to the MD and Executive Team.


Brand &amp; Reputation Management:


	Own and manage brand positioning for supermarket and QSR formats across Nigeria.
	Ensure brand consistency across stores, digital platforms, and communications.
	Oversee promotions, campaigns, and store activations to increase footfall and basket size.
	Protect corporate reputation through proactive communications and crisis management.


Customer Experience &amp; Engagement:


	Drive customer-centric strategies to improve in-store and QSR experience.
	Oversee customer feedback systems includingCSAT, complaints, and service recovery.
	Collaborate with Operations to address customer pain points and improve service delivery.
	Lead loyalty programs, promotions, and retention initiatives.


Marketing Communications, Media &amp; PR:


	Manage all external communications, advertising, media relations, and public affairs.
	Ensure compliance withAdvertising Regulatory Council of Nigeria (ARCON)guidelines.
	Oversee content for social media, websites, in-store signage, and promotional materials.
	Act as a key communications advisor to the MD.


Digital &amp; Performance Marketing:


	Lead digital marketing, social media, online advertising, and CRM initiatives.
	Track and optimize campaign ROI, conversion rates, and customer acquisition cost.
	Support online ordering, delivery platforms, and digital growth where applicable.
	Ensure compliance with&nbsp;Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA)&nbsp;in customer data usage.


ESG &amp; Responsible Marketing


	Integrate&nbsp;ESG principles&nbsp;into marketing and communications strategies.
	Ensure responsible advertising, inclusive messaging, and ethical promotions.
	Support ESG reporting by communicating sustainability initiatives and community impact.
	Partner with HR and ESG teams on employer branding, DEI messaging, and community engagement.


Internal Communications:


	Lead internal communications to engage employees across all locations.
	Support change management, leadership messaging, and culture-building initiatives.
	Collaborate with HR on staff engagement and internal campaigns.


Budget, Governance &amp; Vendor Management:


	Manage marketing budgets with strong cost control and ROI focus.
	Oversee agencies, media buyers, printers, and digital vendors.
	Ensure procurement and contracting comply with internal governance standards.


Team Leadership:


	Build and lead a high-performing marketing and communications team.
	Set clear objectives, KPIs, and development plans.
	Foster a results-driven, collaborative, and ethical work culture.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related discipline with&nbsp;7&ndash;10 years&#39; experiencein marketing, preferably inretail, FMCG, or QSR
	Master&#39;s Degree (MBA) or professional certification is an advantage
	Proven leadership experience managing teams and agencies
	Strong understanding of Nigerian consumer behavior and retail landscape


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@worknigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Head of Marketing & Communications Job at Worknigeria




        
    

        
        Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing & Communications

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Marketing & Corporate Communications
Business Type: Supermarket & QSR Retail Chain
Reports to: Managing Director (MD)

Role Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Head of Marketing & Communications provides strategic leadership for brand, marketing, communications, and customer engagement across the company's supermarket and QSR businesses in Nigeria.
	The role is accountable for driving revenue growth, strengthening brand trust, enhancing customer experience, and supporting the company's ESG commitments, while working closely with the Managing Director and senior leadership team.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Marketing & Growth Leadership:


	Develop and execute integrated marketing strategies aligned with annual revenue and expansion targets.
	Translate business objectives into measurable marketing and growth initiatives.
	Lead annual marketing planning and budget management across all outlets.
	Provide data-driven insights and recommendations to the MD and Executive Team.


Brand & Reputation Management:


	Own and manage brand positioning for supermarket and QSR formats across Nigeria.
	Ensure brand consistency across stores, digital platforms, and communications.
	Oversee promotions, campaigns, and store activations to increase footfall and basket size.
	Protect corporate reputation through proactive communications and crisis management.


Customer Experience & Engagement:


	Drive customer-centric strategies to improve in-store and QSR experience.
	Oversee customer feedback systems includingCSAT, complaints, and service recovery.
	Collaborate with Operations to address customer pain points and improve service delivery.
	Lead loyalty programs, promotions, and retention initiatives.


Marketing Communications, Media & PR:


	Manage all external communications, advertising, media relations, and public affairs.
	Ensure compliance withAdvertising Regulatory Council of Nigeria (ARCON)guidelines.
	Oversee content for social media, websites, in-store signage, and promotional materials.
	Act as a key communications advisor to the MD.


Digital & Performance Marketing:


	Lead digital marketing, social media, online advertising, and CRM initiatives.
	Track and optimize campaign ROI, conversion rates, and customer acquisition cost.
	Support online ordering, delivery platforms, and digital growth where applicable.
	Ensure compliance with Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) in customer data usage.


ESG & Responsible Marketing


	Integrate ESG principles into marketing and communications strategies.
	Ensure responsible advertising, inclusive messaging, and ethical promotions.
	Support ESG reporting by communicating sustainability initiatives and community impact.
	Partner with HR and ESG teams on employer branding, DEI messaging, and community engagement.


Internal Communications:


	Lead internal communications to engage employees across all locations.
	Support change management, leadership messaging, and culture-building initiatives.
	Collaborate with HR on staff engagement and internal campaigns.


Budget, Governance & Vendor Management:


	Manage marketing budgets with strong cost control and ROI focus.
	Oversee agencies, media buyers, printers, and digital vendors.
	Ensure procurement and contracting comply with internal governance standards.


Team Leadership:


	Build and lead a high-performing marketing and communications team.
	Set clear objectives, KPIs, and development plans.
	Foster a results-driven, collaborative, and ethical work culture.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related discipline with 7–10 years' experiencein marketing, preferably inretail, FMCG, or QSR
	Master's Degree (MBA) or professional certification is an advantage
	Proven leadership experience managing teams and agencies
	Strong understanding of Nigerian consumer behavior and retail landscape


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "title": "Business Development Officer / Manager",
  "description": "Kadvoc Apartment, a service&nbsp;apartment, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer / Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Jabi, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations / Business Development
Reports To: General Manager / Director

Job Summary


	The Manager / Marketer for the Service Apartment is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the facility while driving occupancy through effective marketing and client relationship management.
	The role combines operational management with strategic marketing to ensure profitability, customer satisfaction, and brand growth.
	The Manager / Business Development Manager is expected to be proactive, result-driven, and committed to enhancing the overall guest experience while maximizing profitability.&nbsp;


Key Responsibilities
Operations Management:


	Oversee the day-to-day running of the service apartment.
	Ensure all apartments are well-maintained, clean, and guest-ready at all times.
	Supervise housekeeping, security, and maintenance staff.
	Handle guest check-in and check-out processes efficiently.
	Resolve guest complaints and ensure a high level of customer satisfaction.


Marketing &amp; Business Development:


	Develop and implement marketing strategies to increase occupancy rates.
	Promote the apartment through digital platforms (social media, property listing sites, etc.).
	Build partnerships with corporate organizations, travel agencies, and relocation firms.
	Manage online presence and respond to inquiries and bookings promptly.
	Monitor market trends and competitor activities to adjust pricing and strategies.


Sales &amp; Revenue Management:


	Set pricing strategies based on demand, season, and competition.
	Track bookings, revenue, and occupancy rates.
	Prepare periodic sales and performance reports.
	Identify new revenue opportunities (long-stay packages, corporate deals, etc.).


Customer Relationship Management:


	Maintain strong relationships with existing and potential clients.
	Ensure repeat business through excellent service delivery.
	Handle feedback and implement improvements where necessary.


Administrative Duties:


	Maintain accurate records of bookings, payments, and expenses.
	Prepare reports for management on performance and operations.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant regulations.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Occupancy rate.
	Revenue growth.
	Customer satisfaction ratings.
	Number of new clients/partnerships secured.
	Online visibility and engagement.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or related field.
	Proven experience in hospitality, real estate, or serviced apartment management.
	Strong marketing and sales skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in digital marketing and online booking platforms.
	Good organizational and leadership abilities.
	Experience in the Hospitality Department is an additional advantage.


Key Skills:


	Customer service excellence.
	Negotiation and sales skills.
	Digital marketing (social media, online listings).
	Problem-solving and decision-making.
	Team management and coordination.


Benefit
Salary structure is based on commission / target delivery.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;human.resources@doxixconsults.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
